message:
fix: parse tmux socket from TMUX env var instead of hardcoding town name

InitRegistry was calling SetDefaultSocket with the town name (e.g. gt),
making all tmux commands use -L gt. But crew sessions launched from
terminals run on the default socket, so gt commands could not find them.

Now parses the socket name from TMUX env var when inside tmux, falling
back to town name only when spawning new tmux servers outside tmux.
This fixes gt cycle, gt handoff, and gt mail for all crew sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
